name: Boston Fern
description: Boston Fern is a lush indoor plant with soft, feathery fronds. It is known for its air-purifying qualities and refreshing green appearance. The plant grows best in indirect light with regular watering. It looks beautiful in hanging baskets or decorative pots.

name: Snake Plant
description: Snake Plant is a very popular low-maintenance indoor plant, perfect for beginners. It can survive in low light and requires very little watering. This plant is also known for helping improve indoor air quality. Its tall, upright leaves give a modern and stylish look to any space.

name: Aloe Vera
description: Aloe Vera is a well-known succulent plant valued for its medicinal and skincare benefits. The thick green leaves contain a gel that is widely used for skin care. It requires minimal watering and grows best in bright light. This plant is easy to maintain and ideal for indoor spaces.

name: Jade Plant
description: Jade Plant is a popular succulent often associated with good luck and prosperity. It has thick, fleshy leaves that store water, making it very easy to maintain. The plant grows best in bright light and needs minimal watering. It is commonly used as a decorative tabletop plant.

name: Rubber Plant
description: Rubber Plant is a popular indoor plant with large, glossy leaves that enhance home décor. It helps improve indoor air quality and creates a fresh environment. This plant grows best in bright, indirect light. With proper care, it can grow into a tall and attractive indoor tree.

name: ZZ Plant
description: ZZ Plant is a hardy indoor plant known for its shiny, dark green leaves. It can tolerate low light and requires very little watering. This makes it perfect for offices and busy lifestyles. Its sleek and modern appearance makes it a stylish decorative plant.

name: Areca Palm
description: Areca Palm is a beautiful indoor palm that adds a tropical feel to any space. It helps maintain indoor humidity and improves air quality. The plant grows well in bright, indirect light. Its soft, feathery leaves make it perfect for living rooms, offices, and large indoor areas.

name: Anthurium
description: Anthurium is a stunning indoor plant known for its bright red, heart-shaped flowers. It adds a vibrant and decorative look to homes and offices. The plant grows well in bright, indirect light and humid environments. Its glossy leaves and long-lasting flowers make it very attractive.

name: Ashoka Tree
description: Ashoka Tree is a beautiful ornamental tree known for its lush green leaves and fragrant orange-red flowers. It is widely planted in gardens and landscapes for its elegant appearance. The tree grows best in warm climates with good sunlight. It also holds cultural and traditional significance in many parts of India.

name: Neem Tree
description: Neem Tree is well known for its powerful medicinal and antibacterial properties. Its leaves, bark, and oil are widely used in natural remedies and skincare products. The tree grows easily in tropical climates and requires minimal maintenance. It also helps purify the environment and improve air quality.

name: Mango Tree
description: Mango Tree is a popular fruit tree known for producing delicious and juicy mangoes. It grows well in warm climates and requires good sunlight for healthy growth. The tree provides dense shade and enhances the beauty of gardens. Mango trees are also valued for their long lifespan and productivity.

name: Guava Plant
description: Guava Plant is a fast-growing fruit plant known for its nutritious and flavorful guava fruits. It adapts well to different soil types and climates. The plant requires moderate watering and good sunlight to produce healthy fruits. It is commonly grown in home gardens and orchards.

name: Coconut Tree
description: Coconut Tree is a tropical plant known for producing nutritious coconuts. It grows tall with long, graceful leaves and thrives in warm coastal climates. Every part of the tree, including the fruit, leaves, and trunk, is useful. Coconut trees are widely planted for both agricultural and decorative purposes.

name: Banyan Tree
description: Banyan Tree is a large and majestic tree famous for its wide canopy and aerial roots. It provides extensive shade and is often found in parks and village areas. The tree has strong cultural and spiritual importance in India. It is also known for its long lifespan and impressive size.

name: Peepal Tree
description: Peepal Tree is a sacred tree known for its heart-shaped leaves and spiritual significance. It is believed to improve air quality and produce oxygen throughout the day. The tree grows well in open spaces with plenty of sunlight. It is commonly planted near temples and public places.

name: Palm Tree
description: Palm Tree is a popular ornamental plant known for its tall trunk and large, elegant leaves. It gives a tropical and relaxing look to gardens and landscapes. Palm trees grow best in warm climates with good sunlight. They are widely used for outdoor decoration and landscaping.

name: Bamboo Plant
description: Bamboo Plant is a fast-growing plant known for its strong stems and eco-friendly uses. It is widely used in construction, furniture, and decoration. Bamboo grows well in a variety of climates and requires moderate care. It also helps improve the environment by producing more oxygen.

name: Tulsi Plant
description: Tulsi Plant, also known as Holy Basil, is a sacred plant widely used in Indian households. It is valued for its medicinal and health benefits. Tulsi leaves are commonly used in herbal remedies and teas. The plant grows well in sunny areas with regular watering.

name: Curry Leaf Plant
description: Curry Leaf Plant is widely used in Indian cooking for its aromatic leaves. It adds a unique flavor to many traditional dishes. The plant grows well in warm climates and requires good sunlight. Fresh curry leaves are also known for their health and digestive benefits.

name: Lemon Plant
description: Lemon Plant is a small fruit tree known for producing fresh and tangy lemons. It grows best in sunny conditions with well-drained soil. Lemons are widely used in cooking, beverages, and home remedies. The plant also adds beauty and freshness to home gardens.

name: Papaya Plant
description: Papaya Plant is a fast-growing tropical plant that produces sweet and nutritious papaya fruits. It requires warm weather and plenty of sunlight to grow well. The fruits are rich in vitamins and beneficial for digestion. Papaya plants are commonly grown in home gardens and farms.

name: Banana Plant
description: Banana Plant is a tropical plant known for producing delicious and energy-rich bananas. It grows quickly and thrives in warm, humid climates. The large green leaves give a lush and tropical look to gardens. Banana plants are widely cultivated for both fruit and ornamental value.

name: Aloe Vera
description: Aloe Vera is a popular succulent plant known for its medicinal and skincare benefits. The thick leaves contain a soothing gel used for skin care and natural remedies. It requires minimal watering and grows well in bright light. Aloe Vera is easy to maintain and perfect for home gardens.

name: Snake Plant
description: Snake Plant is a hardy plant known for its tall, upright leaves and easy maintenance. It grows well in low light and requires very little watering. The plant helps improve indoor air quality. Its modern look makes it popular for homes and offices.

name: Hibiscus
description: Hibiscus is a beautiful flowering plant known for its large and colorful blooms. It is commonly grown in gardens for decorative purposes. The plant grows well in sunny areas with regular watering. Hibiscus flowers are also used in herbal teas and hair care products.

name: Bougainvillea
description: Bougainvillea is a vibrant flowering plant known for its bright and colorful bracts. It is widely used for garden decoration, fences, and walls. The plant thrives in sunny environments and requires minimal care. Bougainvillea adds a lively and attractive look to outdoor spaces.

name: Areca Palm
description: Areca Palm is a graceful palm plant that adds a tropical feel to gardens and indoor spaces. It has soft, feathery leaves that create a refreshing green look. The plant grows best in bright, indirect light with moderate watering. It is commonly used for decoration and landscaping.

name: Croton
description: Croton is a colorful ornamental plant known for its vibrant red, yellow, and green leaves. It adds a bold and decorative element to gardens and indoor spaces. The plant grows best in bright sunlight. With proper care, croton plants maintain their bright and attractive foliage.

name: lavender Flower
description: Lavender is a beautiful flowering plant known for its purple blooms and calming fragrance. It is widely used in gardens, perfumes, and essential oils. The plant grows best in sunny locations with well-drained soil. Lavender also attracts butterflies and bees, making it great for garden biodiversity. It is easy to maintain and adds a relaxing, decorative touch to outdoor spaces.

name: Dahlia
description: Dahlia is a stunning flowering plant known for its large and colorful blooms. It is widely grown in gardens for decorative purposes. The plant grows best in full sunlight with regular watering. Dahlias add vibrant colors and beauty to outdoor landscapes.

name: Zinnia
description: Zinnia is a bright and cheerful flower that blooms in many vibrant colors. It is easy to grow and ideal for home gardens. The plant thrives in sunny locations and requires minimal care. Zinnias are popular for attracting butterflies and enhancing garden beauty.

name: Lemon Plant
description: Lemon Plant is a small fruit plant that produces fresh and tangy lemons. It grows best in sunny conditions with well-drained soil. The plant requires moderate watering for healthy growth. Lemons are widely used in cooking and beverages.

name: Mint (Pudina)
description: Mint is a fast-growing herb known for its refreshing aroma and flavor. It is commonly used in drinks, chutneys, and herbal remedies. The plant grows well in partial sunlight with regular watering. Fresh mint leaves add freshness to many dishes.

name: Areca Palm
description: Areca Palm is a decorative plant known for its soft, feathery leaves. It adds a tropical look to homes, offices, and gardens. The plant grows best in bright, indirect light with moderate watering. It also helps improve indoor air quality.

name: Ferns
description: Ferns are lush green plants known for their delicate and feathery leaves. They thrive in shaded environments with good moisture. Ferns are commonly used for decorative purposes indoors and outdoors. Their greenery adds a fresh natural look.

name: Bamboo Palm
description: Bamboo Palm is an elegant indoor plant with tall stems and green leaves. It gives a refreshing and tropical feel to any space. The plant grows well in indirect light with moderate watering. It is also known for improving indoor air quality.

name: Croton
description: Croton is a colorful plant famous for its vibrant leaves in red, yellow, and green shades. It adds a bold decorative look to gardens and interiors. The plant grows best in bright sunlight. Proper care keeps its leaves bright and healthy.

name: Bougainvillea
description: Bougainvillea is a vibrant plant known for its bright pink, purple, and orange bracts. It is often used to decorate walls, fences, and gardens. The plant thrives in sunny environments and requires minimal care. It creates a lively outdoor look.

name: Hibiscus (Gudhal)
description: Hibiscus is a beautiful flowering plant with large and colorful blooms. It grows best in sunny locations with regular watering. The flowers are also used in herbal teas and hair care remedies. Hibiscus plants enhance the beauty of gardens.

name: Coleus
description: Coleus is a decorative plant known for its brightly colored leaves. It is widely grown in pots, gardens, and balconies. The plant prefers partial sunlight and moderate watering. Its unique foliage makes it very attractive.

name: Golden Pothos
description: Golden Pothos is a popular indoor plant with heart-shaped green leaves and golden patterns. It is easy to grow and requires minimal maintenance. The plant thrives in low to medium light conditions. It is also known for improving indoor air quality.

name: Song of India
description: Song of India is an attractive plant with green leaves edged in yellow. It adds a tropical and stylish look to interiors and gardens. The plant grows well in bright, indirect light. It is commonly used for decoration and landscaping.
